name: MC Payment Limited
summary: MC Payment Limited provides merchant payment and digital commerce enabling services in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, and Thailand. The company offers online-to-offline solutions through its integrated platform with a focus on servicing merchants in the retail, transportation, and food and beverage industries. Its products include online payment solutions; ffastpay POS that accepts various payment methods with one terminal; ffastpay Limo through which private hire drivers can receive customers preferred payment method with their mobile phones; and HeroHippo that integrates self-ordering and digital-payment solution. The company also offers MCP E-Invoice, which creates and sends invoices through email; MCP Quickpay for creating payment links or QR codes for transactions; and MCP Batch Processing that processes multiple transactions at one go. MC Payment Limited is headquartered in Singapore, Singapore.
